text: Hey, how are you doing? It's Caroline calling for wellness direct. Thanks for picking up. What can I do with it? Actually, there's a painless glucose monitor that tracks your sugar all day, no fingerprints. To see if you qualify for this, do you have Medicare Part A and B? Do I do, yeah. Okay, I'm going to connect you with a specialist right now. Hold tight for just a second, please.
